title: Replace error: any catches with proper typing
description: 26 instances of catch (error: any) across the codebase. Replace with proper error typing.

context.text: 33 catch(error:any) replaced with catch(error:unknown) + instanceof guards across 10 files. Zero remaining.

acceptanceCriteria: All catch blocks use unknown or specific error types
instanceof checks for Error vs other
No any casts in error handling
